programs.title: Mountain Vets
programs.desc: Vet Nigel discovers a worrying growth on much loved cow Florence, but will she have a second chance? Vet Gillian must perform surgery on dog Bailey so that he can be rehomed.

programs.title: Colors of the Islands: The Caribbean
programs.desc: Ep. 1: Waters of Bimini - Master underwater photographer Andre Musgrove is challenged to re-envisage the island of Bimini through his lens. He decided to take the team underwater to show magnificent shipwrecks, wildlife and visuals while photographing master free diver Sophia Palvachinni in these locations.

programs.title: Bamay
programs.desc: This episode of Bamay showcases beautiful Arrernte and Warlpiri Country, with locations such as Mparntwe Alice Springs and the Ellery Creek Big Hole.

programs.title: NHK World English News Morning
programs.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programs.title: ANC Philippines The World Tonight
programs.desc: Delivers the top stories of the day, covering political, economic, and social sectors on both local and global fronts.

programs.title: DW English News
programs.desc: News and analysis of the top international and European news and current affairs from Berlin, in English.
